title: pyrus glacialis
intro: Pyrus glacialis, also known as the Pyrus glacialis tree or Manchurian pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This deciduous tree is native to China and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus glacialis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial effects. The herbal preparations of Pyrus glacialis typically include the bark, leaves, and fruit, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
